creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Pedro Giffuni will take over maintaining this port for the time being.  
I'm a bit swamped at the moment.

I'll still be available for questions if necessary.

Regards,

    Jason

Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of math/vtk5,
>
> Please note that PR ports/125706 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/125706
>
>
